name: Calamity Trio Apartment AU
description:
Stranger POV x Anne Boonchuy, Sasha Waybright and Marcy Wu

When Anne, Sasha, and Marcy discover that their apartment rent has unexpectedly skyrocketed, they decide that they need a new roommate to help cover the cost, so they post a room online and hope that they can find someone who will be their 4th roommate to their pre-existing trio. Fortunately, they found you. Now's your chance to move in with all three and witness their daily shenanigans!
creator: TheLastRailroader
